landing.hero_title: Your studio deserves a professional agenda
landing.hero_desc: Online booking, automatic payments, Google Calendar, client management — all-in-one for only
landing.cta_trial: 14-day free trial • No credit card required
landing.features_desc: A complete platform to manage your bookings and grow your studio.

agenda.title: Online Calendar
agenda.desc: Google Calendar sync, automatic time slots, conflict management.
details: Automatic booking slots based on your availability
Two-way sync with Google Calendar in real time
Automatic schedule conflict detection
Day, week and month views to manage your sessions
Your clients book directly online 24/7
Automatic notifications for new bookings
howto: Log in to your dashboard and go to Settings > Google Calendar
Click 'Connect Google Calendar' and authorize access
Set your opening hours in Settings > Availability
Choose minimum and maximum slot durations
Your calendar syncs automatically — clients see your availability in real time

payments.title: Integrated Payments
payments.desc: Stripe & PayPal, automatic deposits, one-click refunds.
details: Accept credit card payments via Stripe
PayPal option for more client flexibility
Automatic deposits (50%, 80% or fixed amount) at booking
One-click refunds from your dashboard
Invoices generated automatically for each transaction
Financial dashboard with revenue tracking
howto: Go to Settings > Payments
Click 'Connect Stripe' and follow the Stripe account setup steps
Configure your desired deposit percentage (50%, 80% or fixed amount)
Optional: Add your PayPal account in Settings > PayPal
Payments go directly to your bank account linked to Stripe

instrumentals.title: Beat Store
instrumentals.desc: Built-in store with licenses, download and payment.
details: Beat store integrated into your studio website
License system (Lease, Premium, Exclusive) with configurable prices
Audio player with beat previews
Automatic download after payment
WAV, MP3 and stems file management
Sales and revenue tracking per beat
howto: Go to the 'Instrumentals' section of your dashboard
Click 'Add a beat' and upload your audio file
Set prices for each license type (Lease, Premium, Exclusive)
Add a cover image and description
Optional: Upload stems for the Exclusive license
Publish — your store is live!

security.title: Secure Data
security.desc: Each studio has its own isolated and secured data.
details: Complete data isolation: each studio has its own space
Secure authentication with email confirmation
Google OAuth login available for convenience
Encryption of sensitive data (payments, client information)
Row Level Security (RLS) on Supabase to protect every query
Daily automatic backups
howto: Your data is automatically secured as soon as you create your studio
Enable Google authentication in Settings > Security
Set a strong password (min. 12 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 special)
Regularly check access in Settings > Team Members
Your clients' data is isolated — no other studio can access it

chatbot.title: AI Chatbot
chatbot.desc: Smart assistant to qualify your clients 24/7.
details: AI chatbot available 24/7 on your studio page
Answers frequently asked questions (rates, availability, equipment)
Qualifies prospects and guides them to booking
Customizable with your studio's information
Conversation history viewable in the dashboard
Reduces time spent answering the same questions
howto: Go to Settings > AI Chatbot
Enable the chatbot and configure the welcome message
Add key information: rates, hours, equipment, address
Customize answers to frequently asked questions
The chatbot automatically appears on your public page

emails.title: Automatic Emails
details: Automatic confirmation email after each booking
Reminders sent 24h and 1h before the session
PDF invoice generated and sent automatically
Follow-up email after the session to retain your clients
Customizable templates with your studio name and logo
Complete history of sent emails
howto: Emails are enabled by default when you create your studio
Customize templates in Settings > Emails
Add your logo and edit confirmation texts
Configure reminders: 24h before, 1h before, or both
Optional: Add a custom post-session follow-up message
